title: 第 11 課｜一維運動：從能量讀出軌跡｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
不先解二階運動方程，也能看出粒子如何運動。利用能量守恆判斷允許區域、速度與轉向點，理解一維有限振盪。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 11 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 11 | One-Dimensional Motion from Energy | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
We can understand one-dimensional motion without first solving a second-order equation. Energy conservation reveals the allowed region, speed, turning points, and bounded oscillation.

Lesson 11 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
